hero.headline: Plan Smart. Hold Smart. Sell Smart.
hero.subheadline: An AI-powered platform helping farmers make intelligent crop and market decisions.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to make smarter farming decisions

cropPlanning.title: Smart Crop Planning
cropPlanning.desc: AI-powered crop recommendations based on your land, budget, and market trends.

priceIntel.title: Price Intelligence
priceIntel.desc: Real-time market prices with trend analysis and hold/sell suggestions.

analytics.title: Advanced Yield Analytics
analytics.desc: Track your farm's performance with deep-dive analysis of profitable and failed crops.

shelfLife.title: Shelf-Life Monitoring
shelfLife.desc: Track your harvest freshness and get alerts before spoilage.

govSchemes.title: Government Schemes
govSchemes.desc: Discover subsidies, insurance, and support programs available to you.

chatbot.title: AI Advisory Chatbot
chatbot.desc: Get instant farming advice powered by artificial intelligence.

chat.title: AI Advisory Chatbot
chat.greeting: Hello {{name}}! I'm your AI farming advisor. How can I help you today?

dashboardPage.chooseModule: Choose a module to get started with your farm management.
dashboardPage.addCurrentToTrack: Add your current crops to track daily expenses, monitor growth, and predict profits.
dashboardPage.noNegotiationsDesc: Head to the marketplace to find fresh crops from farmers.

marketplace.title: Crop Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Browse available crops from farmers and send purchase requests.
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search by crop or farmer name...
marketplace.noCropsListed: No farmers have listed crops yet. Check back later!
marketplace.urgentSell: Crop nearing spoilage – sell within a few days.

buyerRequests.title: Buyer Requests
buyerRequests.subtitle: Manage purchase requests from buyers for your crops.
buyerRequests.noRequestsDesc: No buyer requests yet. They will appear here when buyers request your crops.
buyerRequests.acceptConfirm: Accept this request? The crop quantity will be reduced.

cropPage.title: Crop Management
cropPage.subtitle: Predict, plant, and track your agricultural expenses.
cropPage.noCropsDesc: You haven't added any crops yet. Use the AI Prediction tool to find the best crop for your land.

shelfPage.title: Shelf Life Monitoring
shelfPage.subtitle: Monitor your harvest health and storage duration in real-time.
shelfPage.noCropsDesc: Start tracking your harvest shelf life by adding a new storage record above.

schemesPage.title: Government Scheme Finder
schemesPage.subtitle: Find eligible agricultural schemes and financial support based on your region and crop.
schemesPage.noSchemes: No specific schemes found for the selected criteria. Try changing your state or loss type.

expensesPage.title: Expenses & Profit Tracker
expensesPage.subtitle: Record daily worker costs, fertilizers, and track your net profits.
expensesPage.noCropsDesc: You must add a crop to your Dashboard before you can track expenses.

empty.profitDesc: You don't have any {{status}} crops showing profit.
empty.lossDesc: Great! No {{status}} crops have reported losses yet.

farmerTalk.title: Farmer Talk
farmerTalk.subtitle: Ask questions, share solutions, and build a community knowledge base for farming.
farmerTalk.noQuestionsDesc: Be the first to ask a question to the community!
farmerTalk.noReplies: No replies yet. Be the first to help out!
farmerTalk.replyPlaceholder: Share your experience or advice here...
farmerTalk.guide3: Do not spam or post promotions.
farmerTalk.askModalDesc: Describe your crop issue or farming question below to get help from fellow farmers.
farmerTalk.placeholderTitle: e.g. How to control whiteflies in Tomato crop?
farmerTalk.placeholderDesc: Describe the problem, symptoms on the plants, and what you have already tried...
